title: Kalaan defectors
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Brenn_guarded.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The Kalaan defectors surrounding [[Brenn Tantor]]'s cell.]]
{{Quote|General, you've pulled me out of a half-dozen situations I never thought I'd survive. If you think this is a good idea, I'm in.|[[Gana Lant]] to [[Brenn Tantor]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Force Commander">''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''</ref>}}
The '''Kalaan defectors''' were a unit of ten [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] who had served under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Brenn Tantor]] for most of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Intensely loyal to the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] who had pulled them through so many battles, they were shocked when he was [[Prison/Legends|imprisoned]] on [[Kalaan/Legends|Kalaan]] after refusing an order to [[Death/Legends|kill]] civilians. In what turned out to be a catastrophic error, [[Grand General/Legends|Grand General]] [[Malcor Brashin]] assigned them to guard Tantor in his outdoor cell. [[Gana Lant]], one of the stormtroopers, convinced the nine others to free Tantor.

With Tantor [[Escape from Kalaan|freed]], the stormtroopers stole the [[Tracked Mobile Base|TR-MB prototype]] and stormed the [[Kalaan prison|prison]], freeing [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. The group trekked through Kalaan's canyons, picking up support from the [[Kalaanite resistance]] until they arrived at a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base set up by [[Tyr Taskeen]]. From there, they were taken to Taskeen's [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]], where would presumably have been imprisoned temporarily along with their general. When released, they most likely continued serving the Rebellion as [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|infantry]] under Tantor.

*[[Otome Mafai]]
